children.heading: .—Administrator
children.label: 1 .—Administrator
children.text: The term “Administrator” means the Administrator for Federal Procurement Policy appointed pursuant to .section 1102 of this title

children.heading: .—Agency board or agency board of contract appeals
children.label: 2 .—Agency board or agency board of contract appeals
C
children.text: the board of contract appeals of the Tennessee Valley Authority; or

children.label: D
children.text: the Postal Service Board established under .section 7105(d)(1) of this title

children.heading: .—Agency head
children.label: 3 .—Agency head
children.text: The term “agency head” means the head and any assistant head of an executive agency. The term may include the chief official of a principal division of an executive agency if the head of the executive agency so designates that chief official.

children.heading: .—Armed services board
children.label: 4 .—Armed services board
children.text: The term “Armed Services Board” means the Armed Services Board of Contract Appeals established under .section 7105(a)(1) of this title

children.heading: .—Civilian board
children.label: 5 .—Civilian board
children.text: The term “Civilian Board” means the Civilian Board of Contract Appeals established under .section 7105(b)(1) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: means an individual who, by appointment in accordance with applicable regulations, has the authority to make and administer contracts and to make determinations and findings with respect to contracts; and

children.label: B
children.text: includes an authorized representative of the contracting officer, acting within the limits of the representative’s authority.

children.heading: .—Contractor
children.label: 7 .—Contractor
children.text: The term “contractor” means a party to a Federal Government contract other than the Federal Government.

children.label: A
children.text: an executive department as defined in ;section 101 of title 5

children.label: B
children.text: a military department as defined in ;section 102 of title 5

children.label: C
children.text: an independent establishment as defined in , except that the term does not include the Government Accountability Office; andsection 104 of title 5

children.label: D
children.text: a wholly owned Government corporation as defined in .section 9101(3) of title 31

children.heading: .—Misrepresentation of fact
children.label: 9 .—Misrepresentation of fact
children.text: The term “misrepresentation of fact” means a false statement of substantive fact, or conduct that leads to a belief of a substantive fact material to proper understanding of the matter in hand, made with intent to deceive or mislead.
